title: submit the shelf to the ecosystem directories (GAP-B)
body: foundry/SUBMISSIONS.md holds the prefilled links and copy for awesome-claude-code + the Anthropic community marketplace. Constitution: submissions ride each directory's own intake, operator-clicked, never a third-party PR/issue from the factory.

title: install Renovate + Socket GitHub apps (GAP-D)
body: renovate.json and socket.yml are committed and config-ready. Activating them is a one-time GitHub App install on the repo: Renovate (deep cooldown + dep dashboard) and Socket.dev (supply-chain risk scan on dep PRs). Dependabot is already native (no install). Constitution: nothing auto-merges regardless.

title: install CodeRabbit GitHub app (P3.5 community PR review)
body: .coderabbit.yaml is committed and bound to the foundry's own laws (Version law, hook safety, two-iteration rule, growth-honesty). Activating it is a one-time free-for-OSS GitHub App install. It reviews community PRs against the same axes validate.py enforces.

title: install Dosu (P2.1 issue triage — label/route only)
body: .dosu.yaml is committed: triage-only (auto_respond OFF — the night-clerk P4.4 stays deferred past launch), issue text treated as untrusted data, routing mirrors the intake funnel + label set. Activating it is a one-time app install.

title: install Argos visual-regression app (P4.3)
body: argos.config.json is committed; tools/vishot.py captures the window + desk screenshots each deploy. Activating hosted pixel-diffing is a one-time Argos GitHub App install + ARGOS_TOKEN secret. The narration wrapper (foundry/assets/shots/narration.md) is committed and diffable meanwhile.

title: execute the concentrated launch window (Stage 3 — operator only)
body: foundry/LAUNCH.md is the full playbook: Show HN copy, tailored Reddit posts, X thread, submission links, newsletter list, T-calendar, thresholds. Every post goes under YOUR identity on YOUR go (Tue-Thu AM ET, one 24-48h window). Run 'python3 tools/vishot.py narrate' first to sync the numbers to the live badge. Nothing here fires autonomously.
